tools.name: build_resume_with_templates
tools.description: Builds a professional resume using structured CV/resume data with multiple template options. Accepts personal information (name, contact details), work experiences, education history, skills, languages, and social profiles. Generates preview images for multiple professional templates (Classic, Professional, Prime ATS, Traditional) and returns base64-encoded preview images, a customize URL for further editing, and the structured resume JSON. Provides an interactive widget for template selection and allows downloading the resume as PDF or DOCX format.

tools.name: download_resume
tools.description: Converts structured CV/resume data into professional resume previews with multiple template options. Accepts personal information (name, contact details), work experiences, education history, skills, languages, and social profiles. Generates preview images for multiple professional templates (Classic, Professional, Prime ATS, Traditional) and returns base64-encoded preview images, a customize URL for further editing, and the structured resume JSON. Provides an interactive widget for template selection and allows downloading the resume as PDF or DOCX format.
